summary: Invoice Duplicate Feature Testing - All features working correctly. Backend API tested with pytest (4/4 passed). Frontend UI tested with Playwright - duplicate button, toast notification, and list refresh all working.
passed_tests: POST /api/invoices/{invoice_id}/duplicate - Creates new invoice with new ID and number
Duplicated invoice has created_at with current date
Duplicated invoice preserves items, client_name, total from original
Duplicated invoice appears in invoice list after creation
UI: Duplicate button (Copy icon, green) visible on each invoice card
UI: Button positioned between Edit (blue) and Delete (red)
UI: Clicking duplicate shows toast 'Factura X duplicada como #Y'
UI: Invoice list refreshes and shows new duplicated invoice

features_verified.duplicate_button_visibility: WORKING - Green Copy icon button appears on each invoice
features_verified.duplicate_creates_new_invoice: WORKING - New invoice_id and invoice_number generated

seed_data_creation: Created duplicated invoices during testing (#024, #025 from originals)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice duplicate feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoint POST /api/invoices/{invoice_id}/duplicate creates new invoice with auto-generated number. Frontend button with data-testid='duplicate-invoice-{id}' triggers handleDuplicateInvoice(). Toast notification confirms new invoice number.

code_verification.frontend_button: Invoices.js line 2152-2161: Button with Copy icon, green color, data-testid
